---
title: "Comparing loss of polling location to share of mail voters"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    embed-resources: true
author: "Akira Kyles and Diego Torrealba"
date: last-modified
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD: HH:MM"
output: html_document
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: sentence
---

# 2016 compared to 2024

```{=html}
<iframe src="total_ppp_&_mail_share_16_24.html" width="100%" height="500px" style="border:none;"></iframe>
```


# 2016 compared to 2020

```{=html}
<iframe src="total_ppp_&_mail_share_16_20.html" width="100%" height="500px" style="border:none;"></iframe>
```


# 2020 compared to 2024

```{=html}
<iframe src="total_ppp_&_mail_share_20_24.html" width="100%" height="500px" style="border:none;"></iframe>
```
